subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-07-31 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: These Arab Sheikhs do not understand what fair discussion means... This man [Rasheed Pasha] according to popular traditions must have been bad even before Adam and Eve.
subcodes.subjects: @Ottoman commissions of investigation, @bribery and corruption, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
